title: Premier Housewares Durable Design Chrome Roll Holder Versatile Roll Holder for Kitchen Sturdy Free Standing Toilet Roll Holder Compact Paper Towel Holder for Home
features: Durable Reflective Metal: Crafted from strong metal with a polished chrome finish, this kitchen roll holder ensures long-lasting functionality. Its reflective surface enhances the look and appeal of any kitchen space.
Sleek Functionality: Featuring a decorative finial atop its stem, this chrome kitchen roll holder keeps towels close at hand for spills and splashes while adding a stylish touch to your countertop.
Stable Base: The wide round base ensures stability, preventing the roll from tipping over and keeping paper towels off kitchen surfaces for a cleaner, more organized space.

Convenient Design: Fully assembled and ready to use, this kitchen roll holder requires no setup. Cleaning is effortless—simply wipe with a soft cloth. Avoid abrasive cleaners to preserve the chrome finish.

Compact and Practical: Measuring H36 x L13 x W13 cm and weighing only 0.14 kg, it offers a small footprint without sacrificing functionality. Keep your paper towels easily accessible while maintaining a tidy kitchen environment.
description: From the manufacturer Premier Housewares Kitchen Roll Holder The kitchen roll holder is ideal for ensuring that spillages and splashes can be wiped up quickly with your paper towels being close to hand. Made using durable metal and given a chrome finish, the holder will keep your kitchen organised and tidy. The slim design ensures it doesn't take up to much room on your countertops making it ideal for smaller kitchens. Adding a touch of chic to your kitchen, the holder will complement a modern setting. Features Stylish Practical Durable Organise your kitchen Chic finish Kitchen Roll Holder
